name: async_fetch_retry
description: - Use **Promises**, `async/await`, and the native `fetch` API to retrieve data from a remote public API endpoint. - Implement an **Exponential Backoff Retry Mechanism** to automatically retry failed requests with increasing delays. - Handle potential Promise rejections/errors gracefully in `try...catch` blocks. - Use Node.js's native `fs.promises` module to perform asynchronous file system writes.
